commands.name: env
commands.summary: Check dotenv files and configured env rules.

commands.name: cache
commands.summary: Check framework and tool cache directories, size, permissions, and Laravel artifacts.

commands.name: http
commands.summary: Check configured HTTP URLs without making network requests.

commands.name: ports
commands.summary: Check local development port conflicts.

commands.name: php
commands.summary: Check PHP runtime, composer platform requirements, memory, php.ini, and Xdebug in CI.

commands.name: node
commands.summary: Check Node.js project and package manager health.

commands.name: frontend
commands.summary: Check frontend presets and build readiness for Vite, Next.js, Nuxt, Astro, and generic frontend projects.

commands.name: flutter
commands.summary: Check Flutter and Dart pubspec, lockfiles, SDK constraints, dependency sources, and platform markers.

commands.name: mobile
commands.summary: Check native Android and iOS project markers, wrappers, debug flags, and lockfiles.

commands.name: monorepo
commands.summary: Check monorepo tooling, workspace lockfiles, and root package scripts.

commands.name: python
commands.summary: Check Python manifests and dependency manager health for pip, Poetry, Pipenv, uv, and Conda.

commands.name: ruby
commands.summary: Check Ruby and Rails manifests, lockfiles, versions, credentials, database config, and gem sources.

commands.name: go
commands.summary: Check Go modules, sums, workspaces, local replace directives, toolchain directives, and vendor metadata.

commands.name: rust
commands.summary: Check Cargo manifests, lockfiles, workspaces, toolchains, dependency sources, and release profiles.

commands.name: java
commands.summary: Check Maven, Gradle, Ant, wrappers, Java versions, risky build scripts, and Spring profile red flags.

commands.name: mcp
commands.summary: Check MCP server configuration files across common agent clients, secret hygiene, remote URLs, env references, supply-chain pins, and risky commands without starting servers.

commands.name: iac
commands.summary: Check Terraform, OpenTofu, and Terragrunt manifests, lockfiles, module refs, and secret hygiene.

commands.name: kube
commands.summary: Check Kubernetes manifests and Helm charts, locks, images, services, and secret hygiene.

commands.name: dotnet
commands.summary: Check .NET solutions, projects, SDK pinning, target frameworks, lock mode, and NuGet sources.

commands.name: cpp
commands.summary: Check C/C++ build files, dependency managers, compile commands, and portability risks.

commands.name: web
commands.summary: Check generic web entry files, asset references, public config, server hints, and port declarations.

commands.name: laravel
commands.summary: Check Laravel .env, APP_KEY, debug mode, APP_URL, runtime directories, and config cache.

commands.name: symfony
commands.summary: Check Symfony .env hygiene, APP_SECRET, runtime directories, recipe drift, and Composer scripts.

commands.name: security
commands.summary: Check env examples, hard-coded secrets, risky scripts, and risky Compose settings.

commands.name: composer
commands.summary: Check Composer project health without install/update.

commands.name: deps
commands.summary: Run Composer and Node dependency diagnostics together.

commands.name: db
commands.summary: Check database environment configuration, with optional read-only PDO connection checks.

commands.name: queue
commands.summary: Check queue environment configuration and production sync risks.

commands.name: git
commands.summary: Check repository hygiene and sensitive files.

commands.name: docker
commands.summary: Check Compose files, daemon state, ports, and containers.

commands.name: health
commands.summary: Run a broad local project health check, with ports available through --include-ports.

commands.name: doctor
commands.summary: Alias for health with the same broad local project checks.

commands.name: ci
commands.summary: Run CI-safe diagnostics, baselines, and aggregate exit codes, with optional policy profiles.

commands.name: presets
commands.summary: Detect supported project presets across ecosystems.

commands.name: inventory
commands.summary: Show detected presets, available modules, and auto-selected modules.

commands.name: commands
commands.summary: List DevDoctor commands and their documentation metadata.

commands.name: version
commands.summary: Show the current DevDoctor version for humans or automation.

commands.name: explain
commands.summary: Explain issue codes and their built-in hints.

commands.name: policy
commands.summary: Show DevDoctor safety and compatibility policy.

commands.name: support-bundle
commands.summary: Print redacted support context without writing files.

commands.name: self-update
commands.summary: Check for a newer DevDoctor release and show or run the safest update command.

commands.name: init
commands.summary: Preview and optionally write devdoctor.yml after confirmation.
